name: NubiferOS 0.1.2
body:
## NubiferOS 0.1.2

A security-focused Linux distribution for cloud engineers.

### Changes
- fix: lower ISO size test threshold from 1.0GB to 0.5GB
- feat: compact security dashboard layout for single-screen viewing
- feat: taller detail panel in audit viewer, add to GNOME dock favorites
- fix: remove duplicate APT publish from ISO workflow, fix package versioning
- feat: add signed APT repo publishing to CI pipeline
- feat: bump to 0.1.3 — audit viewer, apt-mark manual for nubifer packages
- feat: add GTK3 Audit Trail Viewer for visual cloud command history
- fix: nubifer-branding dpkg conflict with base-files on /etc/issue
- chore: bump version to 0.1.2 for OTA delivery of recent fixes
- fix: Trivy APT repo uses NubiferOS codename instead of Debian codename
- fix: remove GNOME Keyring dependency from token cache — use encrypted files only
- fix: pre-warm GPG agent in aws wrapper to prevent credential_process hang
- chore: add autonomy permissions to CLAUDE.md for faster workflow
- fix: kernel CVEs, lynis dep, dashboard workspace & update tracking
- fix: 3 dashboard/packaging bugs — lynis, workspace display, update tracking
- fix: OTA update pipeline — GPG dearmoring, dpkg registration, CDN cache
- fix: add amd64 architecture to APT repo so packages are discoverable
- fix: resolve AWS CLI hang caused by GPG decryption in wrapper
- feat: add CLI audit trail — local cloud command history
